description_long: This object is a pair of over-ear wireless headphones, featuring large, cushioned ear cups that are predominantly black with metallic silver outer covers. The headband is thick and padded, covered in a textured blue material for comfort and style, and connects the ear cups with sturdy, articulated joints. The ear cups appear to have integrated controls and a charging port, suggesting modern functionality. The overall design is sleek and ergonomic, with a focus on comfort for extended use. The materials used are likely a combination of plastic, synthetic leather, metal, and foam for durability and comfort. This type of object is commonly seen in urban environments, used for personal audio listening on the go.
description: A pair of modern, over-ear wireless headphones with black cushioned ear cups, silver accents, and a blue padded headband. The design is sleek, ergonomic, and built for comfort and durability.
description_view_0: Front view showing both large, black cushioned ear cups and the thick, padded blue headband arching over the top.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the silver outer cover of the ear cup and the textured blue headband, with visible joint articulation.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full curve of the blue headband and the backs of the ear cups, emphasizing the padding and comfort features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other ear cup's silver cover and the connection between the headband and ear cup.
